tasks.title: Inventory new DateTime( call sites
tasks.description: Ripgrep `new DateTime\(` across `lib/` and produce a complete inventory of call sites; classify each as user-supplied input, internal/trusted value, or literal/now.

tasks.title: Confirm exhaustiveness of user-supplied sites
tasks.description: Confirm the user-supplied sites listed in design.md are exhaustive; add any newly discovered sites to the inventory.

tasks.title: Add failing regression test for the defect
tasks.description: Add a regression test that demonstrates the current defect: write an object with publishedAt = '' for a date-time property, read it back, assert value is NOT the current datetime (fails before fix, passes after).

tasks.title: Create DateTimeNormalizer class
tasks.description: Create lib/Service/DateTimeNormalizer.php (final location confirmed at code review) with the contract from design.md D2.

tasks.title: Implement normalize()
tasks.description: Implement normalize(mixed $value): ?DateTimeImmutable with rules: null → null, trim + empty → null, DateTimeInterface → pass through as immutable, parse failures → null + debug log.

tasks.title: Implement formatForDatabase()
tasks.description: Implement formatForDatabase(mixed $value): ?string returning Y-m-d H:i:s or null.

tasks.title: Implement formatForIso8601()
tasks.description: Implement formatForIso8601(mixed $value): ?string returning ISO 8601 with offset or null.

tasks.title: Wire up as injectable service
tasks.description: Register as an injectable service (no static state; DI via constructor).

tasks.title: Docblock mandate
tasks.description: Add a class docblock stating that all user-datetime conversion MUST go through this class and referencing this change.

tasks.title: Unit: null input → null
tasks.description: Test null input produces null.

tasks.title: Unit: empty string → null
tasks.description: Test empty string input produces null.

tasks.title: Unit: whitespace-only → null
tasks.description: Test whitespace-only string inputs ('   ', '\t', '\n') produce null.

tasks.title: Unit: ISO 8601 with offset
tasks.description: Test valid ISO 8601 with offset produces correct DateTimeImmutable.

tasks.title: Unit: ISO 8601 Zulu
tasks.description: Test valid ISO 8601 Zulu produces correct DateTimeImmutable.

tasks.title: Unit: database format
tasks.description: Test Y-m-d H:i:s input produces correct DateTimeImmutable.

tasks.title: Unit: date-only
tasks.description: Test Y-m-d input produces DateTimeImmutable at midnight.

tasks.title: Unit: existing DateTime passthrough
tasks.description: Test existing DateTime/DateTimeImmutable passthrough produces an immutable instance.

tasks.title: Unit: garbled string
tasks.description: Test garbled strings produce null and emit a debug log.

tasks.title: Unit: non-string non-null non-DateTime
tasks.description: Test numeric/array/object input produces null and emits a debug log.

tasks.title: Unit: formatForDatabase + formatForIso8601
tasks.description: Test formatForDatabase and formatForIso8601 with each of the preceding inputs.

tasks.title: Migrate MagicStatisticsHandler date branch
tasks.description: Replace the date branch at ~line 583 with a delegation to the normalizer (format to Y-m-d).

tasks.title: Migrate MagicStatisticsHandler date-time branch
tasks.description: Replace the date-time branch at ~line 590 with a delegation to the normalizer (format to ISO 8601).

tasks.title: Add MagicStatisticsHandler tests
tasks.description: Add/extend a MagicStatisticsHandler test covering: empty-string stored value → rendered as null; valid stored value → rendered correctly.

tasks.title: Migrate MagicBulkHandler::formatDateTimeForDatabase
tasks.description: Delegate to DateTimeNormalizer::formatForDatabase; remove direct new DateTime($value).

tasks.title: Migrate MagicMapper metadata handling
tasks.description: Delegate metadata datetime conversion (~line 2986) to the normalizer; keep the existing default-to-now-when-key-is-absent logic for created/updated exactly as-is (D3).

tasks.title: Migrate MariaDbSearchHandler::normalizeDateValue
tasks.description: Delegate to the normalizer; return null on empty/invalid input (D5).

tasks.title: Verify no remaining unguarded sites
tasks.description: Grep for any remaining unguarded new DateTime($ on user-supplied paths; migrate or document why each remaining site is safe.

tasks.title: Integration: POST publishedAt='' → GET null
tasks.description: POST object with publishedAt='' → GET object → publishedAt is null.

tasks.title: Integration: valid datetime round-trip
tasks.description: POST object with publishedAt='2026-04-20T14:00:00Z' → GET object → value round-trips correctly.

tasks.title: Integration: absent publishedAt → GET null
tasks.description: POST object WITHOUT publishedAt in payload → GET object → publishedAt is null (unchanged behavior).

tasks.title: Integration: bulk import empty dates
tasks.description: Bulk import path with empty-string date values → no current-datetime substitution.

tasks.title: Integration: search with empty date filter
tasks.description: Search with publishedAt='' filter → no SQL predicate for empty filter (or no-op predicate).

tasks.title: Integration: expires='' persists as null
tasks.description: POST metadata with expires='' → persisted as null.

tasks.title: Integration: absent created → defaults to now
tasks.description: POST without created in payload → created defaulted to now (existing behavior preserved).

tasks.title: opencatalogi regression check
tasks.description: Run opencatalogi test suite against the patched backend; confirm no regressions.

tasks.title: softwarecatalog regression check
tasks.description: Run softwarecatalog test suite against the patched backend; confirm no regressions.

tasks.title: docudesk spot-check
tasks.description: Spot-check docudesk flows that consume OpenRegister datetime values (where applicable).

tasks.title: composer check:strict passes
tasks.description: PHPCS, PHPMD, Psalm, PHPStan all clean.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG update
tasks.description: Update CHANGELOG.md with a user-facing note on the behavior correction.

tasks.title: Release note
tasks.description: Empty-string date fields now correctly round-trip as null; previously, empty-string dates on existing objects rendered as the current datetime. On next read/save, the value normalises to null.

tasks.title: Follow-up: data-normalisation maintenance command
tasks.description: Optional: file a follow-up issue for the stored-data normalisation maintenance command (UPDATE ... SET col = NULL WHERE col = '') flagged in design.md §Migration Plan.

tasks.title: openspec verify
tasks.description: Run openspec verify fix-empty-string-date-conversion and resolve any findings.

tasks.title: Open PR
tasks.description: Open PR referencing this change; link the failing-then-passing regression test from task 1.3.
